시편 56:1.content: Be merciful to me, God, for man wants to swallow me up. All day long, he attacks and oppresses me.

시편 56:2.content: My enemies want to swallow me up all day long, for they are many who fight proudly against me.

시편 56:3.content: When I am afraid, I will put my trust in you.

시편 56:4.content: In God, I praise his word. In God, I put my trust. I will not be afraid. What can flesh do to me?

시편 56:5.content: All day long they twist my words. All their thoughts are against me for evil.

시편 56:6.content: They conspire and lurk, watching my steps. They are eager to take my life.

시편 56:7.content: Shall they escape by iniquity? In anger cast down the peoples, God.

시편 56:8.content: You count my wanderings. You put my tears into your container. Aren’t they in your book?

시편 56:9.content: Then my enemies shall turn back in the day that I call. I know this: that God is for me.

시편 56:10.content: In God, I will praise his word. In Yahweh, I will praise his word.

시편 56:11.content: I have put my trust in God. I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?

시편 56:12.content: Your vows are on me, God. I will give thank offerings to you.

시편 56:13.content: For you have delivered my soul from death, and prevented my feet from falling, that I may walk before God in the light of the living.
